steps.title: Count tall birch and maple trees
steps.content:
Birch: $$6 \times 8 = 48$$ tall birch trees.
Maple: $$5 \times 9 = 45$$ tall maple trees.

steps.title: Compute conditional probability
steps.content:
Total tall trees: $$48 + 45 = 93$$.
Probability maple given tall: $$\frac{45}{93} = \frac{15}{31}$$ after dividing numerator and denominator by $3$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
